title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RBwAPR-2nD&R11e-LR8G, wAP LR8G kit
description: wAP LR8G kit is a complete out-of-the-box solution for use as LoRaWAN gatewayk. The device includes a pre-installed R11e-LR8G module , 1 Ethernet port RJ45 , and a 2.4GHz wireless card . All of this comes in the familiar wAP design for outdoor installation on walls or poles Thanks to the use of the new LR8G LoRa module, the devicebrings reliable LoRa solutions at an even better price. The wAP LR8G kit supports frequencies 863 - 870 MHz and the updated LoRa module delivers enhanced Rx sensitivity up to -141 dBm , extending your range and improving reliabilityâeven in rough conditions The LoRa network (Long Range) is ideal for long-distance wireless communication with low power consumption, making it perfect for Internet of Things (IoT) applications. It uses low-frequency bands and allows devices to connect over tens of kilometers, making it suitable for monitoring sensors, smart meters, or outdoor equipment Device Mounting bracket PoE injector 24V / 0.8A power adapter Desktop stand Hose clamp
